BONUS вЂ“ Launch Partnership
Three Types of Deals вЂ“ an Overview
The first one is the simplest, and this is just where you're either
consulting or you're coaching.
ВЁп‚Ё You're not actually producing
ВЁп‚Ё You're not doing the work
ВЁп‚Ё You're just either meeting in person or getting on the phone for a defined amount of
money
ВЁп‚Ё It's just x number of dollars for x amount of time
ВЁп‚Ё It could be a one shot deal, or it could be a monthly deal, or it could be a weekly
ВЁп‚Ё It could be a series of calls
ВЁп‚Ё You could do a day, or it could be an hour, or it could be a half a day
ВЁп‚Ё It could be a Skype session
ВЁп‚Ё It could be four calls
ВЁп‚Ё It could be anything you want at any dollar amount you want
ВЁп‚Ё You're just coaching them. You're saying, "Did you think about this? Did you think
about that? You might want to do this. You might want to do that. That plan looks
too aggressive. The timing on this looks a little crazy. Yeah, that script looks
fantastic. You might want to add in these bullet points. I think the offer's a little
weak here. You might be able to get these partners there."
The next type of deal is where you actually partner with someone.
ВЁп‚Ё This is where someone else has a domain of knowledge. They're the expert. They're
the talent, so to speak
ВЁп‚Ё Then you're providing the marketing
ВЁп‚Ё This deal works as 70/30, 70% for the marketing and the business and 30% for the
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

BONUS вЂ“ Launch Partnership
talent (the talent is replaceable)
The third model is what we call the PLM model, the Product Launch
Manager model.
ВЁп‚Ё YouвЂ™re actually running the launch for someone.
ВЁп‚Ё Client selection is extremely important on this one
ВЁп‚Ё You have to get paid up front
ВЁп‚Ё Get paid x number of dollars up front. That's just to sign the deal
ВЁп‚Ё Then you get paid a percentage for the launch -- Example structure would be 10% of
the gross for the launch -- pre-refunds
ВЁп‚Ё Scale it up as the launch goals are exceeded
ВЁп‚Ё The other thing you need is a retainer
ВЁп‚Ё Upfront, plus retainer, plus percentage
ВЁп‚Ё Be crystal clear at both sides on what they're paying for, what they're going to get,
what you're going to do, how the numbers are going to get calculated
ВЁп‚Ё It doesn't have to be some fancy legalese
